empty.title: No groups yet
empty.description: Create your first group to assign clients and tokens to a set of servers at once.

form.createSubtitle: Pick a URL-safe slug and a human-readable label. The slug is permanent.
form.editSubtitle: Update the label and description. The slug stays locked for API/CLI stability.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete fleet group?
deleteConfirm.noTarget: Cannot delete this group: it still has agents/tokens and there is nowhere to move them — create another group first.
deleteConfirm.moveTo: All of them will be moved to “{{target}}”. Continue?

detail.label: Label
detail.noIntegrations: No integrations yet. The catalog expands as new kinds get registered in the backend — DNS round-robin, webhooks and others will appear once their kind is on file.
